summary.en: A shift pattern where a company moves from selling products or services one transaction at a time to orchestrating a platform where third parties, developers, partners, or users create compounding value.
summary.zh: 一种迁移模式：公司从逐笔销售产品或服务，转向编排一个让第三方、开发者、伙伴或用户共同创造复利价值的平台。

sources.label: Osterwalder et al. · The Invincible Company · Wiley · 2020 · Shift Pattern Library

references.label: Alexander Osterwalder, Yves Pigneur, Fred Etiemble & Alan Smith · The Invincible Company · Wiley
references.pages: Shift Pattern Library: From Sales to Platform

note.en: Defines platform shifts as a way for established models to create stronger networked positions.
note.zh: 把平台迁移定义为成熟模式建立更强网络化位置的方法。
